evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Internally consistent: uses mapbox-gl v3 Standard style, Directions v5 endpoint, session_token param. docs_unavailable so long-tail handling applies; consistent with version claim ('v3').

evidence.completeness: All six pieces: (a) token acquisition via account.mapbox.com with explicit steps; (b) pip and npm install bash blocks; (c) env vars VITE_MAPBOX_PUBLIC_TOKEN and MAPBOX_SECRET_TOKEN named; (d) main.py backend; (e) App.jsx frontend; (f) uvicorn + npm run dev test commands. Env-var names consistent.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Only a single link to account.mapbox.com dashboard (not docs.mapbox.com). No official documentation URLs cited near code.
